text: Hi Sarah, I hope you're doing well. Would you mind reviewing the budget proposal when you have a moment? There's no rush -- whenever is convenient for you. Thank you so much!
Send me the report by end of day. I needed it yesterday.
Hey team, just a heads up that the meeting has been moved to 3 PM tomorrow. Let me know if that works for everyone.
I don't understand why this wasn't done already. This was supposed to be finished last week. What's the holdup?
Could you please clarify the requirements for the Q3 deliverables? I want to make sure I'm on the right track. I'd really appreciate your guidance on this.
The presentation slides need major revisions. Fix the formatting and redo the charts. This is not acceptable quality.
I was wondering if it might be possible to adjust the project timeline slightly. I think we could produce a much stronger result with an extra week. What do you think?
Please find attached the meeting minutes from today's session. Feel free to reach out if anything needs correction.
Why wasn't I CC'd on this email chain? I should have been included from the start. Don't let this happen again.
Thank you for bringing this issue to my attention. I'll look into it right away and get back to you with an update by Thursday. I appreciate your patience.
